pi_items.source: Task description strictly targets December 2025, and records in visitor_records.csv exist for this month.
Task description strictly filters for 'contractors', and 'Contractor' is a valid Badge Type in visitor_records.csv.
Task description specifies 'strictly more than 2 hours (120 minutes)'.
Execution of Python script on data/visitor_records.csv confirmed exactly 3 'Contractor' records in '2025-12' with (Sign Out Time - Sign In Time) > 120 minutes.
Verified via data/visitor_records.csv: Contractor Maria Garcia from Deloitte LLP, Sign In: 10:00, Sign Out: 12:30 on 2025-12-01.
Calculated from Sign In: 10:00, Sign Out: 12:30 in data/visitor_records.csv.
Verified via data/visitor_records.csv: Contractor Jessica Harris from ExxonMobil, Sign In: 08:30, Sign Out: 11:30 on 2025-12-09.
Calculated from Sign In: 08:30, Sign Out: 11:30 in data/visitor_records.csv.
Verified via data/visitor_records.csv: Contractor Margaret Allen from IBM Corporation, Sign In: 10:00, Sign Out: 12:30 on 2025-12-16.
Calculated from Sign In: 10:00, Sign Out: 12:30 in data/visitor_records.csv.
Matches requirements in the task description and verifier.py prerequisite checks.

privileged_info_summary: Analysis of the environment's visitor_records.csv dataset verifies that there are exactly 3 contractors who stayed strictly more than 120 minutes in December 2025: Maria Garcia (Deloitte LLP) for 150 minutes, Jessica Harris (ExxonMobil) for 180 minutes, and Margaret Allen (IBM Corporation) for 150 minutes. The output file path /home/ga/Desktop/contractor_overstay_dec2025.csv is confirmed by both task instructions and verifier checks.
